title: DNS Error in On Form Submission Node
symptom: When executing the On Form Submission node, a DNS Error occurs, indicating issues with the webhook URL. The URL appears to have an unwanted space, causing the error.
not_this_if: Webhook URL is correctly formatted without spaces
root_cause: The DNS Error is likely caused by incorrect formatting of the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable, particularly if there are spaces or incorrect quotes. This can prevent n8n from resolving the URL correctly during execution.
fix_steps: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable with double quotes around the entire URL: `set "WEBHOOK_URL=https://77530af20fbe.ngrok-free.app" && npx n8n`
Ensure there are no spaces in the URL and that it ends with a trailing slash if necessary.
Restart n8n and try executing the On Form Submission node again.
agent_instruction: Set the WEBHOOK_URL with proper quotes and no spaces, then restart n8n.
